flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Camden County College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.6k → $4.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Camden County College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.7k → $4.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Camden County College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Camden County College rose 29% between 2006 and 2009 (9.2% → 11.9%).
